Authors and Citation

Authors

  • Raydonal Ospina. Author, maintainer.

  • Leila D. Amorim. Author.

Citation

Source: inst/CITATION

Ospina R, Amorim L (2026). prLogistic: Estimation of Prevalence Ratios via Logistic Regression Models. R package version 2.0.2, https://github.com/Raydonal/prLogistic. 

@Manual{,
  title = {{prLogistic}: Estimation of Prevalence Ratios via Logistic Regression Models},
  author = {Raydonal Ospina and Leila D. Amorim},
  year = {2026},
  note = {R package version 2.0.2},
  url = {https://github.com/Raydonal/prLogistic},
}

Amorim L, Ospina R (2021). “Prevalence ratio estimation using R.” Anais da Academia Brasileira de Ciências, 93(4), e20190316. doi:10.1590/0001-3765202120190316. 

@Article{,
  title = {Prevalence ratio estimation using {R}},
  author = {Leila D. Amorim and Raydonal Ospina},
  journal = {Anais da Academia Brasileira de Ciências},
  year = {2021},
  volume = {93},
  number = {4},
  pages = {e20190316},
  doi = {10.1590/0001-3765202120190316},
}
